description: overlays/pkg/local/bootstrap-github.nix (lines 14-23) handles both getent (Linux) and dscl (macOS) for REAL_HOME detection under sudo. bootstrap-cachix.nix (lines 18-26) lacks this logic entirely. Both scripts also hardcode /run/secrets and ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 paths. Unify the home detection logic and consider extracting shared path constants.
title: Harmonize bootstrap script home-directory detection
